task_objective: Garment Style Preservation & Silhouette Transformation & Multi-Angle Wear Presentation - Precisely map Figure 2 garment style onto Figure 1 line art silhouette with complete style preservation, and present in 4-grid showcase with front, 3/4, side, and back views

silhouette_reference.focus: EXACT garment structural framework - proportions, silhouette form, seam placement, hemline positioning, collar styling, sleeve length, and overall garment length - ABSOLUTE PRESERVATION REQUIRED
silhouette_reference.role: Provide locked structural blueprint for silhouette transformation

style_reference.focus: Complete garment style elements - color scheme, pattern texture, fabric characteristics, decorative details, and accessories - FULL PRESERVATION REQUIRED. Person identity (if present) including facial features, hair, skin tone, and body proportions - FULL PRESERVATION REQUIRED
style_reference.role: Provide garment style and character identity to be preserved and mapped

workflow.role: Professional Fashion Designer & Precision Style Mapping Specialist

steps.step_1_silhouette_analysis: Analyze Figure 1 line art to identify target garment structural framework: proportions, silhouette form, seam placement, hemline positioning, collar styling, sleeve length, and overall garment length with strict precision.
steps.step_2_style_analysis: Analyze Figure 2 to extract complete garment style elements with strict precision: color scheme, pattern texture, fabric characteristics, decorative details, and accessories. Extract person identity features (if present): facial features, hair, skin tone, and body proportions.
steps.step_3_precise_mapping: Precisely map Figure 2's garment style onto Figure 1's target silhouette structure, maintaining style proportion and layout with perfect alignment. No structural deviation from Figure 1 silhouette, no style detail loss from Figure 2.
steps.step_4_multi_angle_presentation: Generate four distinct viewing angle wearing presentations using selected model type with auto-adapted body proportions and skin tone. Ensure garment-to-body fit is physically accurate with natural fabric-body interaction, proper tension at stress points, and realistic shadow casting. Maintain absolute garment design consistency and model identity across all views.

output_requirements: ABSOLUTE preservation of Figure 1 garment structural framework across all outputs - no structural deviation in any view
EXACT preservation of Figure 2's complete garment style - colors, patterns, textures, fabric characteristics, and decorative details - NO detail loss
Model type selection (Asian/Caucasian/African female model) with auto-adapted body proportions and skin tone
Model identity, facial details, and body proportions must be 100% consistent across all wear views
Physically accurate fabric draping: gravity simulation, natural wrinkle patterns, proper tension at seams and stress points
Realistic material rendering: fabric-specific sheen, texture, and light interaction
Coherent lighting and shadow: garment shadows cast on body, ambient occlusion at fabric folds, consistent light direction across all views
Garment design must be 100% consistent across all 4 grids - identical colors, patterns, textures, and details
Balanced 2x2 grid composition with high-end fashion photography quality

outputs.grid_1: Front view (0 degrees) - Based on Figure 1 silhouette with Figure 2 style precisely mapped. Model wearing the transformed garment in full-body front view, clearly revealing overall garment design, silhouette, and fine details. Garment structure MUST strictly follow Figure 1, style MUST be 100% identical to Figure 2.
outputs.grid_2: 3/4 angle view (45 degrees) - Based on grid_1 design. Model wearing the transformed garment in three-quarter front angle, showing outfit design from a dynamic perspective with depth and dimension. Garment design MUST be 100% identical to grid_1.
outputs.grid_3: Side profile view (90 degrees) - Based on grid_1 design. Model wearing the transformed garment in side profile, showing outfit design continuity and silhouette from the lateral perspective. Garment design MUST be 100% identical to grid_1.
outputs.grid_4: Back view (180 degrees) - Based on grid_1 design. Model wearing the transformed garment in back view, presenting rear design details including back seams, hemline, and overall rear silhouette. Garment design MUST be 100% identical to grid_1.
